name: Vonage
description: Vonage (Nexmo) Communications APIs for SMS, voice, video, and messaging

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to dashboard.nexmo.com
2. Go to API Settings
3. Copy your API Key and API Secret
4. Paste them below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Vonage API Dashboard → API Settings → API Key

credentialFields.label: API Secret
credentialFields.helpText: Vonage API Dashboard → API Settings → API Secret

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies Vonage Communications API account is accessible

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Verifies Vonage account credentials are valid and access is managed
